title: ZomBoss
description: Can you beat the STRONGEST Zombie in the game?
body:
# ZomBoss
## Features:
- A brand new boss
- New Items
- A GIANT challenge
- Custom texture pack to change the look of the custom items (The texture pack is still under review, you can download it as soon as it gets approved)
## Boss:

The Boss:
![Image of the boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f35a1afe52b558631fe658686a02427d0b8f1e4.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 500 hp
- Small chance to drop the brand new Rotten Heart 
- Multiple Phases
- Rarely drops the Rotten Heart

</details>

## Crafts:

To spawn the boss you will need the Zombie Catalyst, one of the new items. It is crafted like this:

![Crafting recipe of the Zombie Catalys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d521cb7014e37572109b836f5ce88a2ba3cbe898.png)

Throw it on the ground to spawn the boss!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Throwing the Rotten Heart and a Diamond Helmet on the ground grants the brand new Zombie Helmet, one of or even THE strongest helmet in the game with a small surprise waiting on you in-game ;)
- Throwing the Rotten Heart and a Diamond Sword on the ground grants the brand new Zombie Sword, like the Zombie Helmet is this the best sword in the game

</details>
